vectors.name: rustcrypto-xwing-v06-vec0
vectors.split_note: shake_256(seed,96): bytes[0:32]=ML-KEM keygen coin d, bytes[32:64]=ML-KEM keygen coin z (d||z is ML-KEM-768 _keygen_internal input / key_derive seed), bytes[64:96]=X25519 secret scalar (X25519 clamps internally at use; store raw)
